title: Wrong smt-lib model behavior since yosys v0.15

features.name: variable_part_select_on_packed_array_memory_write
features.description: Code should include a variable part-select assignment on a packed array memory element where the index is computed dynamically
features.snippet:
reg [(FIFO_DEPTH * DATA_WIDTH) - 1:0] mem_n;
mem_n[write_pointer_q * DATA_WIDTH+:DATA_WIDTH] = data_i;

features.name: fifo_circular_buffer_with_pointer_arithmetic
features.description: Code should include a circular buffer implementation with read and write pointer management using modulo-style wraparound

features.name: packed_array_memory_with_concat_dimension
features.description: Code should include a packed array memory where the total width is computed via multiplication of depth and data width parameters

features.name: combinational_memory_write_with_gate_clock
features.description: Code should include a combinational always block that computes memory updates and uses a gate_clock signal to control sequential memory storage
